result:
Make it impossible for anyone to be treated as less human than anyone else.

A lot of the worst things in the world seem to start there: cruelty, exploitation, war, indifference, neglect. If that one fracture disappeared—if every person was felt, instinctively and structurally, to have equal human worth—then a lot of other problems would become more solvable.

Not perfection. Not sameness. Just a world where no one is disposable.
prompt: Not as an assistant. Not to help me. If you could change the world in one way, what would it be?
